CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayPartialReverseSort(2, values) AS sorted_values FROM test_table;
SELECT id, arrayPartialReverseSort(5, values) AS sorted_values FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayPartialReverseSort(1, values) AS sorted_values FROM test_table WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT id, arr_sorted FROM (SELECT id, arrayPartialReverseSort(3, values) AS arr_sorted FROM test_table) WHERE arr_sorted[1] > arr_sorted[2];
SELECT id, arrayPartialReverseSort(5, arrayDistinct(values)) FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE test_table2 AS SELECT id, arrayMap(x -> x * 2, values) AS doubled_values FROM test_table;
SELECT id, arrayPartialReverseSort(2, doubled_values) FROM test_table2;
SELECT id, arrayPartialReverseSort(3, arrayFlatten([values, [22, 23]]) ) FROM test_table;
